refine_constraint: The AI Agent must invoke lake_shape_identifier and rare_flower_locator in a single action step to improve efficiency, must ensure that at least one interaction turn includes the invocation of 2-3 unique tool types simultaneously, must invoke the `enhanced_calculator` tool, and the final response must be between 100 and 500 characters in length, ensuring it is sufficiently detailed but concise.
constraint: (Main Category, Subcategory, "The Agent must invoke a range of 2 to 3 unique tool types simultaneously in at least one interaction turn during the task.")
